turns.agentText:
Got it, just the numbers.

{{figure}}

**VincentCross.1469** — 264/332 all-time (**80%**), down to 15/25 recently (**60%**). The most attended player we've looked at after BreakN, and by far the most versatile — 18 different professions including newer elite specs like Antiquary, Galeshot, and Ritualist. The recent dip is worth watching; they're still reliable but clearly showing up less.

**Stan.9684** — 131/332 all-time (**39%**), up to 15/25 recently (**60%**). Trending up noticeably. Pure support role — 143M healing across their runs vs only 14M damage. Plays Troubadour, Druid, Scrapper, Tempest, Firebrand, Chrono — every profession is a healer or boon support.

**Ashtonlightstone.9145** — 65/332 all-time (**20%**), up to 8/25 recently (**32%**). Lowest overall of the group historically but clearly ramping up. Ten professions covering both DPS (Berserker, Dragonhunter, Reaper) and support (Firebrand, Chrono, Scourge).

The trend here mirrors what we saw with Kamoidra and Stan — several players are individually trending upward in the recent window, while VincentCross joins Dub and Vettexl as players who are slightly cooling off from their historical baseline.

data.title: All-Time vs Recent Attendance — Stan, Ashton, VincentCross
